description: We've been serving this Fluffy Marshmallow Fruit Dip at parties for years, and inevitably someone will ask for the recipe.

ingredients.note: (strawberries, watermelon, cantaloupe, honeydew, pineapple, bananas, kiwi, etc.)

steps: Whisk softened cream cheese until smooth.  Add marshmallow cream and whisk again to combine well.  This can also be done using a handheld electric mixer.
Dollop into serving bowl and serve with fresh fruit.
